name: Focus
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Focus (a.k.a. Domination), Sid Sackson 1964: a stacking game on a 52-cell octagonal board. Control a stack by owning its top piece; move the top k pieces exactly k cells orthogonally, landing on top of any stack there. Stacks over 5 shed from the bottom -- your shed pieces go to a reserve you can drop back, enemy shed pieces are captured. The last player able to move wins.
